message:
Implement NumPy array support (Phase 2.1-2.3)

Added NumpyArray type with PyObject integration:

Phase 2.1: Extended PyObject.TypeId
- Added numpy_array and regex types

Phase 2.2: Created NumpyArray struct
- Shape/strides support for N-dimensional arrays
- C-contiguous memory layout
- BLAS-compatible data representation
- Helper methods: zeros(), ones(), fromSlice(), create2D()

Phase 2.3: PyObject marshaling
- createPyObject() - wrap NumpyArray in PyObject
- extractArray() - extract NumpyArray from PyObject
- Full reference counting integration

Tests:
- ✅ 1D/2D array creation
- ✅ PyObject wrapping/extraction
- ✅ Shape/stride calculations

Next: Update c_interop numpy.zig to use PyObject (Phase 2.4)

Note on memory layout:
Current approach bypasses CPython layout by calling BLAS directly.
For full C-API compatibility, will use comptime to generate
CPython-compatible structs (Phase 3 utilities).
